data.title: Free Yourself wins Best Aqueous Fragrance award with Eau at Marie Claire UK Fragrance Awards 2025 - BENNINGTON, Vt., July 18, 2025.
data.description: In Bennington, Vermont, on July 18, 2025, Free Yourself proudly revealed that their fragrance Eau has won the Best Aqueous Fragrance award at the esteemed Marie Claire UK Fragrance Awards 2025. This recognition emphasizes Eau's exceptional scent, showcasing its remarkable olfactory blend.

data.title: Investors in Reddit, Inc. (NYSE: RDDT) advised to contact Levi & Korsinsky regarding securities lawsuit - Jul 18, 2025.
data.description: A legal firm, Levi & Korsinsky, LLP, has informed investors in Reddit, Inc. (NYSE: RDDT) about a class action securities lawsuit as of July 18, 2025. The lawsuit aims to assist investors who incurred losses in their investments in Reddit, Inc. The lawsuit is specifically for individuals who held shares in the Company.

data.title: CPOP (Nasdaq: CPOP) to enter cryptocurrency market with initiatives set to launch in July 2025.
data.description: In Xiament, China on July 18, 2025, Pop Culture Group Co., Ltd. (CPOP) revealed its intention to venture into the cryptocurrency realm. As a prominent entity in the Chinese cultural content sector, the company, listed as CPOP on Nasdaq, disclosed its strategic moves to make a foray into cryptocurrency. The initiatives are set to be implemented by July 2025.

data.title: Investors in DoubleVerify Holdings, Inc. urged to contact Levi & Korsinsky by July 21, 2025 regarding a class action securities lawsuit - DV, NY, July 18, 2025.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, Levi & Korsinsky, LLP announced a class action securities lawsuit for investors in DoubleVerify Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: DV). The lawsuit aims to recover losses for investors in the company. This legal action targets those who suffered financial losses stemming from DoubleVerify's activities.

data.title: MLB handicapper BASports.com had 5 times more profit than anyone else after last year's All-Star break.
data.description: Following the previous All-Star Break, BASports.com, based out of WAUCHULA, Fla., saw a remarkable achievement in the month that ensued. In the MLB Baseball season currently underway, BASports.com managed to secure a significant lead in profits, outperforming competitors by a factor of five. This outstanding performance was reflected in their earnings post-All-Star break, setting a new world record in the industry.

data.title: XOD adds 2 Texas aesthetic providers, Dr. Mark Deuber and Cary Deuber, RN, to Clinical Excellence Team.
data.description: XOD Aesthetics on Demand (XOD, Inc.), a prominent provider of advanced aesthetic technology, headquartered in Boston, recently revealed the inclusion of two notable Texas practices in its Clinical Excellence Leadership Team. The distinguished professionals, Dr. Mark Deuber and Cary Deuber, RN, CRNFA, CANS, Lemmon, have joined the team to further enhance the company's expertise and service offerings. This addition expands XOD Inc.'s reach and capabilities in the field of aesthetic technology, emphasizing its commitment to excellence and innovation. The move reflects the company's strategic vision to grow its influence in the industry and meet the increasing demand for cutting-edge aesthetic solutions.
AMEX CFO SAYS THERE CONTINUES TO BE UNCERTAINTY IN HOW COMING QUARTERS WILL PLAY OUT

data.title: Greg Piper appointed to World Kinect Corporation Board of Directors, bringing 35 years of expertise. CEO lauds his wealth of experience.
data.description: The World Kinect Corporation (NYSE: WKC) based in Miami has appointed Greg Piper to its Board of Directors. Michael J. Kasbar, the chairman and CEO of the company, expressed enthusiasm about the addition, highlighting Piper's extensive experience in energy and commodities, spanning over 35 years. This move is seen as a valuable strategic asset for the company, bringing in a wealth of operational and management expertise to the board.

data.title: Neogen sells cleaners & disinfectants to Kersia Group for $130M in cash, with contingent consideration. Streamlining business focus.
data.description: Neogen Corporation, a prominent player in food safety solutions, has finalized the sale of its worldwide cleaners and disinfectants division to Kersia Group for $130 million in cash upfront, with additional potential payouts depending on the unit's future performance. John Adent, the President, highlighted that this move signifies a significant advancement in streamlining and bolstering the company's concentration on its primary operations.

data.title: Autoliv beats Q2 estimates with $2.21 EPS and $2.714 billion in sales (+4.2% YoY), but China issues impact stock.
data.description: Autoliv, Inc. (NYSE: ALV) surpassed second-quarter earnings expectations with adjusted earnings per share reaching $2.21, exceeding the estimated $1.97. The company reported quarterly sales of $2.714 billion, showing a 4.2% increase from the previous year and surpassing the projected $2.578 billion. CEO Mikael Bratt credited the performance to strong sales growth, cost-reduction efforts, and tariff compensations. Adjusted operating income rose by 14% year over year to $251 million, leading to an expanded adjusted operating margin of 9.3% compared to 8.5% in the prior-year period. However, challenges in China affected the stock performance negatively in Friday's premarket trading. Autoliv demonstrated strong performance in the Americas, Europe, and Asia excluding China, maintaining a global outperformance trend.

data.title: Investors anticipate Domino's Pizza earnings of $3.96/share, expecting revenue of $1.14 billion. Stock could yield $500 monthly.
data.description: Amid market volatility, investors are turning to stable income streams, with Domino's Pizza, Inc. (NASDAQ: DPZ) earnings report for the second quarter generating interest. The report is set to be released on July 21, with analysts predicting earnings of $3.96 per share, a decrease from $4.03 per share last year. Revenue is anticipated to be $1.14 billion, up from $1.1 billion previously. A Morgan Stanley analyst has maintained an Overweight rating for Domino's Pizza and raised the price target to $514 from $510 on July 10. This development has attracted attention from investors looking for potential gains from the company's enticing dividend offerings.

data.title: Online event on September 11, 2025, by ResearchAndMarkets.com to provide GDPR training on data processing, sharing, and managing breaches.
data.description: The "GDPR: Legally Processing and Sharing Data and Managing Data Breaches Training Course" has been newly included in the training offerings on ResearchAndMarkets.com. This comprehensive webinar focuses on ensuring attendees have a thorough understanding of the legal aspects surrounding the processing and sharing of personal data. Compliance with data protection laws is crucial as mishandling can lead to significant repercussions for businesses. Mark Weston will provide insights on the most recent legal requirements and updates, emphasizing their implications on organizations.

data.title: MultiBank Group's $MBG Token to be listed on MEXC and Gate.io in addition to MultiBank.io and Uniswap on TGE Day, July 22, 2025.
data.description: In Hong Kong, MultiBank Group, the largest and most regulated financial derivatives institution globally, has disclosed the upcoming listing of its $MBG Token on two prominent international cryptocurrency exchanges - MEXC and Gate.io. This announcement coincides with the Token Generation Event (TGE) scheduled for July 22, 2025. Alongside being listed on MultiBank.io and Uniswap, the $MBG Token will now also be accessible on MultiBank.io, Gate.io, MEXC, and Uniswap. This dual listing is expected to provide access to millions of users.

data.title: Institutional resilience vital for survival says RCG; public institutions facing legal challenges.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, in Dallas, it was reported by the Reconciliation Consulting Group (RCG), a legal-advisory and compliance firm focusing on institutional resilience, that public institutions, colleges, and nonprofits are encountering significant challenges in an evolving legal landscape. The RCG highlighted the need for these organizations to navigate the changing legal environment effectively.

data.title: MITS Capital and Green Flag Ventures invest $1.5 million in Ukrainian DefenseTech firm Teletactica for jamming-resistant systems.
data.description: In July 18, 2025, a Ukrainian DefenseTech company called Teletactica, which specializes in developing communication systems that are resistant to jamming in hostile environments, has successfully obtained funding from two investors, MITS Capital and Green Flag Ventures. This investment will provide the company with financial support to further develop their technologies and expand their operations.

data.title: Kona Coffee Company expands offerings beyond 100% Kona coffee to include blends and rare single origin coffees.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, in San Diego, the Kona Coffee Company made a significant announcement through PRNewswire. The renowned company, known for its exceptional Kona coffee, revealed an expansion of its product range. This now includes high-percentage Kona blends and rare single origin coffees. The company has maintained its commitment to delivering these products with an unwavering focus on freshness.

data.title: Leoch Battery introduces Smart Energy Solutions at Battery Show Asia 2025, spotlighting All-Scenario innovation.
data.description: In Hong Kong on July 18, 2025, Leoch Battery, a Strategic Partner of The Battery Show Asia 2025, presented its innovative All-Scenario Smart Energy Solutions for the Demand Side at the AsiaWorld-Expo. This launch marked a global premiere as Leoch Battery highlighted its groundbreaking approach to address energy needs in various situations.
Nordwind has opened ticket sales for flights from Moscow to Pyongyang - reports

data.title: Chevron acquires Hess Corporation, completing the acquisition after arbitration; creates a strong energy portfolio.
data.description: In Houston, Chevron Corporation (NYSE: CVX) has successfully acquired Hess Corporation (NYSE: HES) after meeting all closing requirements, including a positive arbitration decision on Hess’ offshore Guyana asset. The newly merged company boasts a highly competitive portfolio in the energy sector, holding top positions in key global markets and a lucrative cash margin production profile.
